variants: Shiori Matsuoka is a prominent figure in the field of Ceramic Engineering, recognized for her innovative work titled Kinetic Resonance Guide. She has been a valuable member of the Twilight Loomshapers Circle, a society that celebrates craftsmanship in ceramics. Her doctoral advisor, Aarisha Vora, played a crucial role in shaping her academic journey. Shiori's research has been largely supported by the Lagoonstar Scholarship Fund, which provided crucial funding for her projects.
